aria-labelledby="stats-heading" — but the heading has class="sr-only" — so it's visually hidden but still announced. This is acceptable for a section that is meant to be announced but not visible. However, the section is visible (it contains the stats list), so hiding the heading visually but keeping it for SR is a common pattern. This is acceptable. | Cookie settings link misused as button

The <section> for stats has aria-labelledby="stats-heading" — but the heading has class="sr-only" — so it's visually hidden but still announced. This is acceptable for a section that is meant to be announced but not visible. However, the section is visible (it contains the stats list), so hiding the heading visually but keeping it for SR is a common pattern. This is acceptable.
